atmosphere_canvas_label: AĒR atmosphere: 3D rotating Earth with live day/night terminator
atmosphere_absence_text: AĒR cannot measure which regions a source's discourse reaches — so it makes no geographic coverage claim here. Per-source Negative Space is in the Dossier.
atmosphere_tooltip_affordance_in_selecti: Shift+click to remove · click to focus
atmosphere_tooltip_affordance_add: Click to select · Shift+click to add
atmosphere_tooltip_affordance_multi: Click to select · Shift+click to multi-select
atmosphere_tooltip_satellite_affordance: Click to open the Dossier for its probe
atmosphere_fallback_notice: Your browser does not support WebGL2, so the 3D atmosphere is unavailable. The live probe state below is the same data the visual surface would render.
atmosphere_fallback_reach_note: Reach is not reported. A probe's emission points mark where its bound publishers emit — not where their content is consumed or influential. No reach claim is made by AĒR.
